children.heading: Acquisition of lands
children.label: a Acquisition of lands
children.text: There are hereby authorized to be appropriated an amount not to exceed $5,000,000 for the acquisition of land, interests in land, or structures within the national recreation area and on the mainland as needed for access and administrative facilities.

children.heading: Other purposes
children.label: b Other purposes
children.text: In addition to the amounts authorized to be appropriated under subsection (a), there are authorized to be appropriated not more than $5,000,000 for development to carry out the other purposes of this subchapter.
